task_updates.executor_notes: Created `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useActiveTaskClips.ts` with one React Query fetch for all active tasks in the selected project (`useQuery` at lines 177-191) and client-side filtering across a registry-derived `generationAssetMap` (`useMemo` at lines 154-175 and 193-211) using imported `taskReferencesGeneration`. Added realtime invalidation for matching project task events via `realtimeEventProcessor.onEvent` (`tasks-created`/`tasks-updated`, lines 221-242). Added exported optimistic support with an 8s timeout through module-level state and `addOptimisticActive` (`lines 24-123`), then unioned queried and optimistic asset keys (`lines 244-256`). Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useActiveTaskClips.ts`, `git diff --check -- src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useActiveTaskClips.ts`, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` all passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `useActiveTaskClips` performs a single project-wide active-task query (`lines 177-191`) and filters those results client-side against the registry-derived generation map (`lines 154-175`, `193-211`) rather than issuing per-clip queries. It also includes both realtime invalidation (`lines 221-242`) and optimistic clip state with exported `addOptimisticActive` plus 8-second timeout handling (`lines 24-123`).
